resources:
Login started! Microsoft Account Local account
Enable the log output interface when the application officially starts running the game Enable log output on game startup Custom path #Welcome to Firefly Android Launcher!!!! Show Current Fps vgpu - (up to 1.16.5, fast) virglrenderer - (all versions, mid) Freedreno (Adreno) - (all versions, mid) Panfrost (Mali) Mouce customization Set mouse pointer icon in game Set done. Remove mouse icon Delete done Quit Launcher Exit the launcher when the running the game Fix Q3 behavior Fix Q3 behavior on 740v3 We have detected that your device is an Adreno GPU. Turning this option on may cause the Zink renderer to not work properly.\nAre you sure you want to turn this option on? Searching for NeoForge version number Sorry, but this version of NeoForge does not have an installer, which is not yet supported. Select NeoForge version Create NeoForge profile
Terminal Initialization Loading...
Other Login Authentication server register Email or user name Password Login Please select the authentication server type Tip Confirm Cancel Please select a role Warning Please enter the Yggdrasil API authentication server address Please enter a 32-bit server ID Uniform Pass External Landing No authentication server Unable to connect to the authentication server. Please check your network and make sure you have entered the correct address.
Experimental Settings Non-professionals should not use it Renderer exp setup Enable Renderer Exp Setup Use more renderer-specific settings Bridge Config OSM initial frame buffer GL initial frame buffer Renderer (Extra) Mesa25.1.4 (Default) Mesa Version Gallium Driver Override
Warning You have turned on experimental settings.This feature may generate unexpected bugs.Continue to use? Fuck Fear already know Done Cancel
GL/GLSL Version Select according to system Use specific version Custom GL/GLSL Allow custom Mesa GL/GLSL version Mesa GL version: Mesa GLSL version: GL version must be between 2.8 and 4.6 GLSL version must be between 280 and 460
Firefly Android Launcher requires permission to manage all files on the device in order to customize the location where game files are saved. Please grant permission to Firefly Android Launcher! Game Path Management Default Path Add New Path Name This Path Delete This Path The launcher will delete this path, but it will not delete the files saved in the corresponding path. You can re-add this path after deletion. Task in progress, path management features are temporarily unavailable
The current resolution is too large, maximum allowable size is %d The current resolution is too small, at least %d is required The input value %s is out of the acceptable range
Control how much memory is allocated to Minecraft Current memory usage: %s / %s, Free memory size: %s Maximum allowable memory size: %s The current memory allocation exceeds available memory size The current memory allocation is too large, maximum allowable size is %d MB The current memory allocation is too small, at least %d MB is required Automatically set the game language to the selected language when the game starts Automatically Set Game Language Set Game Language Follow System Language Override Game Language Ignore the language set in the game and force it to the game language set in the launcher The input value %s MB is out of the acceptable range
Download Mesa Lib Mesa Lib list get fail Select a version to download loading Mesa Lib list Downloading Mesa Lib Mesa Lib download fail Mesa Lib download success Choose Mesa Version(Long press to delete) Default library cannot be deleted Delete Mesa Library Are you sure you want to delete the Mesa%s library? Deleted successfully Delete failed Saved successfully Failed to save Mesa lib, file is corrupt or not executable Bad format, expected format is XX.X.X Please enter text in XX.X.X format
Custom Mesa Loader Driver Override Using DRM Shim Simulates DRM driven behavior The main purpose of DRM Shim is to provide developers with a hardware-free environment for debugging Mesa driver behavior and functionality\n\nAre you sure you want to turn it on? Enable Custom Mesa Load Driver Override(Only for Freedreno) If need, you can freely choose processing method Choose Mesa Loader Driver Override
Launcher settings Launcher Personalization Get updated Get updates for the Launcher Is already the latest version %s A new version %s is available for updating Update Ignore Select Update Source Downloading installation package Download failed Download Complete The APK has been saved to: %s Install Install Update A new version has been downloaded at %s. Do you want to install it? Re-download
Add Enter Version Name Driver saved successfully Failed to save driver, file is corrupt or not executable Delete Turnip Driver Are you sure you want to delete %s ? Custom Turnip Driver Choose Turnip Driver (Long press to delete) Download Turnip Driver Loading Turnip Driver List Turnip Driver list get fail Select a version to download Turnip Driver download fail Downloading Turnip Driver
Choose Download Source Unknown From %s Plugin
TouchController Settings Force enable TouchController Force enable TouchController integration, even if mod file is not found. TouchController vibrate length Set the length of the vibration when using TouchController.
MobileGlues Renderer Settings
Max glsl cache size enter -1 to disable Unit: Megabytes (MB) Error: invalid number. Error: unexpected error. Error: number cannot be 0 or less than -1.
Use ANGLE as OpenGL ES driver Disable if possible Enable if possible Disable Enable
Error setting Auto Do not ignore Ignore shader/program error Ignore shader/program/framebuffer error
MultiDraw emulation Auto Prefer Indirect Prefer BaseVertex Prefer MultiDraw Indirect Forcing DrawElements
ANGLE depth clear workaround Disable Enable workaround #1
Custom target OpenGL Version"
Enable incomplete OpenGL43 extension Enable incomplete ARB_compute_shader extension Disable Recommended \'timer_query\' Extension Enable Advanced \'direct_state_access\' Extension (Experimental) Enable built-in FSR1
Mod Check Report No more reminders Checking mods (%d / %d) Detected that Touch Controller mod (%s) is installed, the launcher is ready to enable control proxy to adapt to the mod. Detected installed Sodium or Embeddium mod (%s). The launcher will disable this mod\'s warnings or prevent it from intentionally crashing on Android devices. However, please note that the mod\'s community has explicitly stated that they will no longer accept any issues related to Android devices. Therefore, if you encounter any problems while using this mod, do not report them to the mod\'s community! The currently used physics mod (%s) is unpatched (replacing libPhysXJniBindings_64.so from x86_64 architecture to arm64), will crash on launch. MCEF (%s) cannot run on Android. It is usually used as a prerequisite dependency for WebDisplays/In-game Browser (browser). Valkyrien Skies/Valkyrien Warfare (%s) cannot run directly in single-player mode. You must run it on a server (Termux can be used), otherwise the game will crash. Yes, Steve Model (%s) 2.2.2–2.5.1 cannot run on the Android system. IMBlocker/In-GameIME (%s) is not compatible with Android and will cause the game to crash during startup. ReplayMod (%s) requires FFmpeg to render videos. Please install the FFmpeg plugin separately\n%s\n%s Borderless Window (%s) is not compatible with Android and will cause the game to crash during startup.
Mods Check Enable Mods Check
Disable Downloader Disable Download Check, Launch Directly
